comment: Minimal ACL subcommand surface only.
Compatibility response surface only; full AOF rewrite lifecycle semantics are not implemented.
Compatibility response surface only; does not provide full Redis background-save lifecycle behavior.
Narrow subset implementation including minimal CLIENT LIST behavior for dependent tests.
Selected subcommands are implemented; unsupported subcommands are cluster-support-disabled.
Implemented behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; executes Lua via mlua (Lua 5.1 vendored) with KEYS/ARGV and redis.call/pcall bridge.
Implemented behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; returns NOSCRIPT on missing SHA and executes cached script body. Replication normalizes mutating EVALSHA to EVAL payloads.
Implemented behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; same as EVALSHA with write-command rejection inside redis.call/pcall.
Implemented behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; write commands are rejected from script context.
Write-capable FCALL execution remains disabled.
Implemented behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED for functions registered via FUNCTION LOAD with no-writes flag.
Supports FLUSH and LOAD [REPLACE] with redis.register_function parsing; full FUNCTION management surface is not implemented.
